data.title: Oracle introduces AI restaurant management tool for Simphony Cloud users, integrating inventory, scheduling, and cash management with AI for global hospitality industry. #technews
data.description: NetSuite Restaurant Operations by Oracle integrates inventory, scheduling, and cash management using AI-driven workflows, benefiting hospitality businesses globally. This software streamlines operations, boosts efficiency, and enhances customer service. With an extensive reach, it caters to restaurants worldwide, offering a comprehensive solution to manage various aspects of the business. The AI-powered features ensure optimized performance and seamless integration, facilitating smooth operations and improved profitability.

data.title: Tech Mahindra and ParkourSC Partner to Deliver AI-Powered Digital Supply Chain Solutions for Global Enterprises
data.description: Tech Mahindra, a leading global provider of technology consulting and digital solutions, has revealed a new partnership with ParkourSC. This collaboration aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in the industry. Based in Pune, India, Tech Mahindra operates on a global scale, while ParkourSC is situated in San Jose, California. The companies are expected to combine forces to enhance their capabilities and offerings in the technology sector.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Launches Crypto-Asset Trading for Individual Investors in the European Economic Area
data.description: Interactive Brokers has introduced crypto-asset trading for individual investors within the European Economic Area. The launch expands trading options for customers in the region, allowing them to access cryptocurrency markets. This move underscores the company's commitment to providing diverse investment opportunities. The introduction of crypto trading is expected to attract a significant number of new customers and increase overall trading volumes within the platform.

data.title: Senior Researchers From NVIDIA, Samsung, NASA, University of Toronto Join AXL to Bring Global AI Expertise to Canadian Venture Creation
data.description: In Toronto, AXL, a Canadian venture studio specializing in applied AI research, has revealed its first batch of Faculty Fellows from the University of Toronto (U of T). The cohort comprises nine esteemed professors focusing on computer vision, machine learning, and related fields, with experience from prominent organizations such as NVIDIA, Samsung, and Adobe. These Faculty Fellows bring a wealth of knowledge from leading global companies, enhancing AXL's capabilities in developing high-growth ventures.

data.title: Paratus Energy: Notice of Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: Bermuda-based company, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (OSLO: PLSV), has announced the scheduling of its 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 12. Shareholders intending to participate in the voting process must ensure that they are registered by April 1.

data.title: Wearable health device maker, Whoop, secures $575M with support from top athletes, now valued at $10B. Targeting health enthusiasts.
data.description: The company, currently valued at $10 billion, has attracted significant investments from top athletes such as LeBron James and Cristiano Ronaldo. It is now targeting regular health enthusiasts in its marketing efforts.

data.title: Analysts forecast ALGO hitting $0.19 by year-end after targeting $0.10 resistance breakout in near term. Technical analysis indicates neutral momentum at $0.09.
data.description: Experts predict a stagnant trend for ALGO with its price standing at $0.09 currently, expected to reach $0.19 by the end of the year. Analysts point out a crucial resistance level at $0.10, emphasizing the need for confirmation of a breakout.

data.title: Saronic Closes $1.75B Series D at $9.25B Valuation to Accelerate a New Era of Maritime Autonomy
data.description: In Austin, Texas on March 31, 2026, Saronic Technologies revealed the completion of a $1.75 billion Series D funding round. The company aims to enhance maritime dominance for the U.S. and its partners by providing large-scale autonomous solutions for both defense and commercial sectors.

data.title: New Oriental to Report Third Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 22, 2026
data.description: On March 31, 2026, New Oriental Education and Technology Group Inc., a leading provider of private educational services in China, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the third quarter. The company, listed on the NYSE as EDU and on the 9901.SEHK, will provide details on its performance during that period.

data.title: Oracle and NetSuite Deliver New AI-Powered Solution for Restaurant Operations
data.description: Oracle and Oracle NetSuite have revealed a new solution, Oracle NetSuite Restaurant Operations, designed to centralize key back-office functions tailored for modern restaurant and hospitality businesses. This unified offering aims to meet the specific demands of the industry. The announcement was made at SuiteConnect London on March 31, 2026. This centralized solution is expected to streamline operations and support businesses in the sector.
